reviews.text:
To say we loved our experience with David is putting it modestly. I hired David to take proposal/engagement photos on a 14er in Colorado and he made it absolutely unforgettable!

David was professional, easygoing, and so much fun to work with. He captured every moment of our proposal perfectly, and even took photos of the unforgettable scenery for us. Despite the challenging hike, David was well-prepared, getting to the summit ahead of us, and even helped me plan other options incase the weather did not cooperate or we couldn't reach the summit. He got the perfect shots of our special moment. The photos came out gorgeous, we couldn't be happier.

We highly recommend David to anyone looking for a talented photographer to capture life’s most important moments. He is a great person and a great photographer, you won't be disappointed!

We can't thank you enough, David!

We loved working with David!  He was always very quick to respond, easygoing, organized and fun to work with throughout the process.  Prior to our wedding day, David visited the site to figure out the best spots for photos.  I wanted to take pictures at a few locations and he scoped everything out to make sure we got the pictures that we wanted.  We did not do engagement pictures so we were a little nervous to be in front of the camera at first, but David was great and made us feel very comfortable.  He also worked with my MOH to ensure we kept to the timeline and that we were never rushed.  Our photos turned out to be AMAZING! I'm so thankful that we had the opportunity to work with David and I highly recommend him to anyone looking for a great photographer!

I don’t even know where to start, Dave is absolutely perfect. From the moment I saw his website, I knew that he had an eye for great photography. My husband and I do not live in Colorado, so our first communication was via email. We set up a call and Dave is so personable and easy-going, we knew he would be the best person to capture our special day. Dave was extremely responsive during the entire wedding planning process and made a point of making himself available during the short period of time that we were in Vail in June to meet with vendors. I have heard from many of my friends that they were not happy with their photographers the day of their wedding and felt like certain shots were missed. This is far from the truth with Dave. For being one person and shooting alone, I am in awe looking at the pictures and seeing all of the amazing shots he took. The portraits and family shots were amazing but I have to admit my favorite are the candid’s he took before the ceremony and during the reception. Dave literally was everywhere at once. My husband and I have both said multiple times that he is our best decision we made for being part the wedding, without him our pictures would not have been the same. Dave told a “story” of our wedding day and it is reflected in the portfolio. After the wedding, within a week Dave sent us “highlight” pictures – I figured that he would send me 10-15 pictures but there were so many!! It was so fun to look through them and share them with our families. He finished all 1000+ of our pictures within a month of our wedding, and he even took time off for his own honeymoon. I would not recommend anyone else but Dave to capture your wedding day, he is beyond worth it and it’s his images that you will get to see for the rest of your life.

Short review: David was an absolute pleasure to work with for an in-home family photo session and an even more talented photographer.  Highly recommend!

Longer review: my family and I hired David to do an in-home family photo session which included a crying 2 mos. old, 8 adults, staged photos, and candid photos while we all cooked a meal together (one of our favorite activities).  David was a pro from start to finish - controlled the crowd, transparent, friendly, efficient, and of course talented in that he took wonderful photos that captured exactly what we were hoping for.  He was also very quick with turnaround, but obviously without compromising quality in any way.  We recommend him without hesitation!

If you are looking for someone who is creative, innovative, and a gem of a person, look no further than David!  He was a delight to work with.
We hired David to shoot our engagement photos and our wedding last fall.
We trekked up to Piney Lake, an area north of Vail.  He had an picked out some amazing spots for us to hike and enjoy the outdoors.
The shots he got were breathtaking, we get so many comments, especially, the "you are so lucky, where did you find this guy?!"
Our wedding day was just as amazing - he got every shot I dream't of and then some.
David is hardworking and so amazing to work with, he will be our photographer for anything and everything!

As a Concierge in the Vail Valley I recommend him to families looking for that special vacation photo, as well as to my friends.

You cannot go wrong with David, he is the best at what he does, and he enjoys what he does, which makes him a true talent!
